title: Pro Trainer
description: Create your own parkour and pass them on the servers
body:
Create your own parkour and pass them on the servers

Commands:


/trainer pos1 // Set the first position to save

/trainer pos2 // Set the second position to save

/trainer load <name> // Load parkour in your world or server

/trainer save <name> // Save, The starting point of the parkour will be your position when you enter this command

/trainer stop // Stop parkour
